item.title: Terra Medi LLC: Hellas Meze Golden Smoked Whole Herring Recall
item.product: Hellas Meze Golden Smoked Whole Herring
item.summary: Un-eviscerated fish may be contaminated with clostridium botulinum Product details: Hellas Meze Golden Smoked Whole Herring
item.remedy: Affected quantity: 20 cases (15 units per case)
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
